title: Karur Records Highest TN Turnout: 92.65% Polling Achieved
summary: Karur district recorded 92.65% voter participation, 7.55% above state average, demonstrating exceptional democratic engagement.

title: Karur Constituency Tops Tamil Nadu with 93.41% Turnout
summary: Karur constituency achieved 93.41% polling, the highest in Tamil Nadu, the same area that witnessed Vijay's stampede in September 2025.

title: IT Department Raids on Senthil Balaji Associates During Elections
summary: Income Tax Department conducted searches on premises of state minister Senthil Balaji's associates in Karur during election period.

title: Seven Injured in Property Clash at Vennaimalai
summary: Seven people sustained injuries in a violent property dispute at Vennaimalai. Police intervened and brought situation under control.

title: EVMs Stored at Karur Counting Centre Under Heavy Security
summary: Electronic voting machines secured at Karur counting centre with multiple layers of security for vote counting process.

title: Hydraulic Equipment Repair Tender Notice Closing April 27
summary: Public tender for repair of hydraulic equipment closing on April 27 as per government procurement procedures.

title: Heavy Rainfall Expected Later This Week to Relieve Heat
summary: IMD forecasts heavy rainfall in coming days bringing welcome relief from the intense heatwave affecting Karur region.

title: Kongu Belt Records 85% Average Turnout; Karur Leads State
summary: Kongu region recorded over 85% average voter turnout across all districts, with Karur topping Tamil Nadu at 92.65%.
